title: Infinite Infinity
description: Allows any item to be enchanted with Infinity.
body:
This data pack allows any item to be enchanted with Infinity, and it'll actually make that item infinitely usable! Whether it's a Totem of Undying, a Diamond Block, a Firework Rocket, Bonemeal, or even a Bucket of Milk, Infinite Infinity will allow you to endlessly use any item to your heart's content!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0z6L3jzU75Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Simply obtain a book with the Infinity enchantment and apply it to your item in an anvil! Alternatively, you can type `/enchant @s infinity` in Creative Mode while holding the item.

### WARNING
**It is incredibly easy to make your infinite items disappear by right clicking too fast, or holding right click and F at the same time. At the moment I can't think of any good way to fix these things without a complete redesign of the mod.**

_[DISCLAIMER: This mod uses Minecraft's data-driven enchantment system, which is considered experimental, requiring a full world reload on initial pack installation.]_
